task_intents: marking a task as a favorite
example_tasks: Bookmark key reference documents for project X
Highlight top priority goals for Q3
Set up template for client onboarding
Curate list of top-performing marketing assets
Flag essential setup instructions for new developers
Create boilerplate repository for new microservices
Save frequently used SQL queries as templates
reasoning: The icon combines a star (representing favorites, importance, or templates) with overlapping cards/squares (representing collections, documents, or templates). This makes it highly suitable for tasks involving creating templates, saving presets, bookmarking key resources, or managing curated collections.
